mapper.select: SELECT checkin_date AS checkinDate, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS count FROM checkin WHERE checkin_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY checkin_date ORDER BY checkin_date

WITH consecutive AS ( SELECT user_id, checkin_date, checkin_date - INTERVAL (ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY checkin_date)) DAY AS grp FROM checkin ), streaks AS ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS streakDays, MIN(checkin_date) AS startDate, MAX(checkin_date) AS endDate FROM consecutive GROUP BY user_id, grp ), current_streaks AS ( SELECT user_id, streakDays, startDate, endDate FROM streaks WHERE endDate >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY ) SELECT u.id AS userId, u.nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, cs.streakDays, cs.startDate, cs.endDate FROM current_streaks cs INNER JOIN `user` u ON u.id = cs.user_id ORDER BY cs.streakDays DESC LIMIT #{limit}
